query:
SELECT id, actionType, status, targetContactId, targetContactName, payload, createdAt 
FROM coach_action_log 
WHERE tenantId = 1 AND actionType LIKE '%workflow%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, actionType, status, targetContactId, targetContactName, payload, createdAt 
FROM coach_action_log 
WHERE tenantId = 1 AND actionType LIKE '%workflow%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
